Metadata.title: Lunatech Agency — Web & Mobile Development
Metadata.description: Premium digital agency crafting futuristic web, mobile, and AI-powered experiences.

hero.headline: Engineering Digital Gravity
hero.sub: We build futuristic digital experiences that attract, engage, and convert.

services.title: Capabilities
services.subtitle: Glass-clear execution across product, brand, and motion.

web.title: Web development
web.desc: High-performance sites and apps — modern stacks, clean architecture, obsessive polish.

mobile.title: Mobile apps
mobile.desc: Native-feel iOS and Android experiences — stable, fast, and store-ready.

design.title: UI / UX design
design.desc: Research-backed interfaces that guide users and amplify your brand story.

ai.title: AI integration
ai.desc: Practical AI features — copilots, automation, and intelligent UX without the gimmicks.

branding.title: Branding systems
branding.desc: Cohesive visual language, design tokens, and guidelines that scale with your product.

motion.title: Motion design
motion.desc: Cinematic micro-interactions and launch storytelling that feel premium, not noisy.

about.title: Why Lunatech
about.mission: We engineer digital gravity — products and brands that pull the right users in and keep them orbiting.
about.philosophy: Space-tech calm meets luxury craft. We favor clarity over clutter, depth over decoration, and outcomes over noise.
about.why: Small senior team, tight feedback loops, and interfaces built like instruments — precise, luminous, and alive.
about.moonBlurb: A fragment of the moon — our symbol for orbit, light, and the pull of great design.

portfolio.title: Selected work
portfolio.subtitle: Immersive case studies — tap a project to explore.

project1.title: Nebula Commerce
project1.summary: Headless storefront with cinematic product storytelling.
project1.body: Placeholder case study: conversion-focused UX, edge performance, and a modular design system for seasonal campaigns.

project5.title: Lunar Rebrand
